headline: Ethereum Bulls Sell: $400M ETH Dumped Overnight

headline: Crypto Firms Eye 2023 Russell Index Inclusion

article.title: Sharplink, Forward Industries among crypto firms considered for Russell indexes
article.summary: Bitmine and Galaxy Digital may also be eligible for the Russell 1000, an index tracking the largest 1,000 US companies that includes Nvidia, Microsoft and Apple.

headline: Stocks Surge 2% as Oil Drops 3% Today

article.title: Stocks Extend Highs on AI Optimism as Oil Slides: Markets Wrap
article.summary: The rally in US stocks is set to stretch into a fifth day as optimism around artificial intelligence, lower oil prices and easing bond yields spurred traders to grow increasingly bullish.

headline: SK Hynix Hits $1 Trillion Amid AI Boom

article.title: SK Hynix Joins $1 Trillion Club Amid AI Frenzy
article.summary: South Korea’s SK Hynix became just the third Asian company to join the $1 trillion club as a breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks and an AI frenzy reshapes economies worldwide. (Source: Bloomberg)
